label: Transparent toucan motif source
prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous transparent motif cutout source
Primary request: Create only a toucan beak motif, isolated full subject, no environment, no props, no text.
Subject: A lively toucan head and oversized beak profile with banana yellow, black, teal, orange, and subtle rainforest green, accurate anatomy, glossy beak material, and crisp natural edges.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; do not crop the beak, eye, or head silhouette.
Lighting/mood: clean studio light that preserves saturated beak color and feather detail.
Transparent workflow: place the subject on a perfectly flat solid #ff00ff chroma-key background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #ff00ff anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no text, no watermark, no props, no landscape, no decorative background, no second subject.

label: Light-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate a comprehensive light-mode design-system board for a Morphous theme named "Morphous Toucan" derived from the transparent toucan beak cutout.
Reference use: The light and dark design-system boards are the reference for coding any future theme. Extract palette, texture rhythm, contrast, spacing mood, and interaction language from the banana yellow, black, teal, orange, and rainforest tones.
Canvas: wide 16:9 board, high-resolution 4K-class source, at least 2400px wide when available.
Required visible sections: Morphous Toucan, Toucan, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Content Dashboard, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens, Generated Assets.
Typography: include English and Japanese examples; use labels like Geist, Noto Sans JP, 見出し, 本文, ラベル, 数値.
UI coverage: buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, command palette, sidebar navigation, content cards, charts, empty/loading/error states, spacing, radius, border, shadow, texture samples.
Style/medium: premium shadcn/tweakcn-style lively content system, precise grid, 8px card radius, bold beak-block dividers, rainforest editorial clarity.
Color palette: use only motif-derived banana yellow, black, teal, orange, leaf green, canopy neutrals, and jungle shade.
Text: use short readable UI labels; avoid long paragraphs.
Constraints: no unrelated bright colors, no generic purple/blue gradients, no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Toucan".

label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate a dark-mode version of the visible Morphous Toucan design-system board. It must feel like the same system translated to dark mode, not a new theme.
Reference use: The light and dark design-system boards are the reference for coding any future theme. Use the transparent toucan cutout and the light-mode Morphous Toucan board as references. Preserve palette roles, beak-block dividers, rainforest texture, component language, spacing, typography, and shadcn/tweakcn coverage.
Canvas: wide 16:9 board, high-resolution 4K-class source, at least 2400px wide when available.
Required visible sections: Morphous Toucan, Toucan, Dark Mode, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Content Dashboard, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens, Generated Assets.
Visual details: dark background derived from toucan black and jungle shade, readable text from canopy cream, primary accents from banana yellow and beak orange, navigation and charts from rainforest teal, subtle canopy texture overlays, crisp shadcn-style cards and controls.
Text: use short readable UI labels; avoid long paragraphs.
Constraints: no neon colors, no unrelated saturated colors, no generic purple gradients, no flat pure-black-only background, no illegible text, no random brand names.
